title: agallis lanata
intro: Agallis lanata, also known as woolly agallis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Agallis lanata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant, making it a valuable remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Agallis lanata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, allowing for various forms of administration to harness its medicinal properties.
